## Research integrity impact

- [ ] Does not weaken no-fabricated-papers, no-fabricated-SOTA, or no-fabricated-results rules.
- [ ] Does not invent local school, advisor, rubric, template, defense, or workload requirements.
- [ ] Keeps strong claims mapped to sources, experiments, implementation evidence, tests, proofs, or official requirements.
- [ ] Marks uncertain or missing evidence as unknown.
